panels.description: Medium shot inside a pale porcelain palace. The narrator, a Victorian explorer, points at unknown inscriptions on a wall while looking down at a confused, gentle-featured Weena. Soft, diffuse daylight.

bubbles.text: I thought Weena might help me interpret this, but the concept of writing was entirely foreign to her.

panels.description: Wide angle interior view of a long, dusty museum gallery. In the center, a colossal, gaunt fossil skeleton looms in the dim light. The narrator stands small in the foreground, realizing the truth.

bubbles.text: My museum hypothesis... it was all confirmed.

panels.description: Medium shot on a forest path at dusk. The narrator is struggling, arms laden with bundles of dried grass and sticks. Weena looks exhausted, trailing slightly behind.
Close up on the narrator's face, wide-eyed with sudden realization. In the dark, out-of-focus background, three pale, crouching Morlock figures are faintly visible between the bushes.

Low angle, intense shot. The narrator is frantically striking a match, his face illuminated by the sudden, small, warm glow against the oppressive dark of the forest. The Morlocks are beginning to shadow the edges of the frame.

bubbles.text: I wondered... what a rare thing flame must be to them now.
